subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who is sanctified above all names and exalted beyond that wherewith the people of creation make mention of Him, and Who transcendeth all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله المقدس عن الاسماء و المنزه عما یذکر به اهل الانشاء و المتعالی عما
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
